releaseNotes:
• Fix (fix9): eliminated the "Cannot seek in this stream." reconnect on every channel open — mpv probes seekability during demuxer init by attempting a seek; MPEG-TS livestreams reject it. Adding force-seekable=no suppresses the probe entirely. Every channel should now open cleanly on the first attempt with no reconnect.
• Fix (fix8 #2): reconnect counter was incrementing by 2 per permanent failure (pre-increment in errorStream + increment in onDisconnect). Removed the pre-increment; onDisconnect is now the single source of truth, giving the correct 1/6 → 2/6 → … sequence.
• Fix (fix8 #3): after "max reconnects reached", the stream could automatically re-open ~60 s later via a background timer. Give-up path now sets exiting=true and cancels all timers.
